---
title: "Reproducibility Efforts"
format: html 
---

### Sanity check
```{=html}
<embed src="toadd" width="700px" height="500px" />
```



### Non-exhaustive list used in development of CORTRE reporting guidelines

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(DT)

rps <- read.csv(here("repro_efforts/Reproducibility_Efforts.csv"))


# Convert title into hyperlinks using Url 
rps <- rps %>%
  mutate(Title = ifelse(
      !is.na(Url) & Url != "",
      paste0('<a href="', Url, '" target="_blank">', `Title`, '</a>'), 
      `Title`
    )
  )

file_url_idx <- which(colnames(rps) == "Title")
col_defs <- list(
  list(targets = list(file_url_idx), visible = FALSE)
)

# Create interactive table with DT
datatable(
  rps %>% 
    select(-Url) %>% 
    rename(Authors = Author, Year = Publication.Year),,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 200,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    dom = 'frtip',
    columnDefs = col_defs
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  escape = FALSE,
  class = 'display nowrap compact',
) %>%
  formatStyle(
    columns = 1:ncol(rps),
    fontSize = '80%'
  ) %>%
  formatStyle(
    columns = which(colnames(rps) == "Author"),
    textAlign = 'left'
  )
```
